name: Fresh Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
Combine oil and sugar in a large bowl. Beat in eggs. Sift together dry ingredients and add to the egg mixture. Pour into a greased 13 x 9 inch baking pan. Bake at 325°F for 55 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely before frosting.
For the cream cheese frosting, beat confectioners' sugar, cream cheese, and butter in another bowl until smooth. Stir in vanilla extract and chopped pecans. Spread over the cooled cake.
